introSection: Lech Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Legendia in Chorzów, Śląskie, Poland. The ride was manufactured by Vekoma and opened on 1 July 2017.

sections.title: History
sections.content: On 18 May 2017, the ride began testing.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Lech Coaster is the first Bermuda Blitz model from Vekoma. It features a tunnel and 3 inversions, with extensively medieval themed surroundings based on the first legendary King of Poland, "Lech".

fullText:
Lech Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Legendia in Chorzów, Śląskie, Poland. The ride was manufactured by Vekoma and opened on 1 July 2017.

On 18 May 2017, the ride began testing.

Lech Coaster is the first Bermuda Blitz model from Vekoma. It features a tunnel and 3 inversions, with extensively medieval themed surroundings based on the first legendary King of Poland, "Lech".
